ddls:
CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the precinct is located */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the precinct is located */,
  "registered_voters_total" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the precinct */,
  "registered_voters_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is registered to vote */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the precinct */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the precinct */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the precinct */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the precinct data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., U.S. Senator) */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., Federal, State) */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats available in the race */,
  "is_open_seat" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the race is for an open seat */,
  "primary_or_general" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the race data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the candidate is running in */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "candidate_description" TEXT /* Description of the candidate */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "incumbent_since" TEXT /* Year the candidate has been an incumbent */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the candidate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "precinct_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the results are from */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the results are for */,
  "total_ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots cast in the precinct */,
  "total_votes_counted" INTEGER /* Total number of votes counted in the precinct */,
  "votes_counted_1" INTEGER /* Number of votes counted in the first count */,
  "votes_counted_2" INTEGER /* Number of votes counted in the second count */,
  "votes_counted_3" INTEGER /* Number of votes counted in the third count */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  "ballots_rejected" INTEGER /* Number of ballots rejected */,
  "ballots_rejected_reasons" TEXT /* JSON array of reasons for rejected ballots */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the election results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_precinct_code FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_code") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result the votes are part of */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the votes are for */,
  "votes_1" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the first count */,
  "votes_2" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the second count */,
  "votes_3" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate in the third count */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "ballots_rejected" INTEGER /* Number of ballots rejected for the candidate */,
  "ballots_rejected_reasons" TEXT /* JSON array of reasons for rejected ballots */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the candidate votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES election_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "precinct_code" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the voter is registered in */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the voter */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter registered */,
  "last_vote_date" TEXT /* Date of the last vote cast by the voter */,
  "voter_status" TEXT /* Status of the voter */,
  "voter_status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the voter status */,
  "voter_type" TEXT /* Type of voter */,
  "voter_address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "voter_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the voter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the voter registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_precinct_code FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_code") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballots_cast" (
  "ballot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot */,
  "precinct_code" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the ballot was cast */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the ballot is for */,
  "ballot_cast_date" TEXT /* Date the ballot was cast */,
  "ballot_type" TEXT /* Type of the ballot */,
  "ballot_status" TEXT /* Status of the ballot */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter who cast the ballot */,
  "ballot_serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the ballot */,
  "ballot_rejected_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ballot being rejected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ballot cast data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_ballot_type FOREIGN KEY ("ballot_type") REFERENCES ballot_types ("ballot_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_ballot_status FOREIGN KEY ("ballot_status") REFERENCES ballot_status ("ballot_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_precinct_code FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_code") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ballots_cast_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voter_registration ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballot_types" (
  "ballot_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot type */,
  "ballot_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ballot type */,
  "ballot_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the ballot type */,
  "ballot_requirements" TEXT /* JSON array of requirements for the ballot type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ballot type data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ballot_status" (
  "ballot_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ballot status */,
  "ballot_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the ballot status */,
  "ballot_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the ballot status */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ballot status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ballot status data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ballot_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Type of data accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precinct_election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "precinct_code" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the official is assigned to */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the election official */,
  "official_email" TEXT /* Email address of the election official */,
  "official_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the election official */,
  "official_position" TEXT /* Position of the election official */,
  "official_department" TEXT /* Department the official belongs to */,
  "official_start_date" TEXT /* Date the official started their role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the official data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precinct_election_officials_precinct_code FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_code") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting history record */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter the history is for */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the voter participated in */,
  "voted_1" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the voter voted in the first count */,
  "voted_2" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the voter voted in the second count */,
  "voted_3" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the voter voted in the third count */,
  "voter_status_at_election" TEXT /* Status of the voter at the time of the election */,
  "voter_type_at_election" TEXT /* Type of voter at the time of the election */,
  "ballot_cast_method" TEXT /* Method by which the voter cast their ballot */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the voter history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_history_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_history_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voter_registration ("voter_id")
)
